backend_code.wallet.service.ts: Added getAllTransactions() — paginated admin query with user include, and getStats() — aggregated wallet metrics
backend_code.admin-wallet.controller.ts: Created AdminWalletController with GET /admin/wallet/transactions and GET /admin/wallet/stats, guarded by AdminJwtAuthGuard + RolesGuard
backend_code.admin-wallet-query.dto.ts: Created DTO extending PaginationDto with optional type filter
backend_code.wallet.service.spec.ts: Added test coverage for getAllTransactions and getStats methods
backend_code.create-variant.dto.ts: Added InitialStockEntry nested class + initialStock field (IsArray, ValidateNested, @Type)
backend_code.variants.service.ts: Imported/injected InventoryService; create() method calls adjustStock for each initialStock entry
backend_code.variants.module.ts: Imported InventoryModule into imports array for DI resolution
backend_code.inventory.service.ts: Fixed releaseExpiredLocks() to restore quantityAvailable and decrement quantityLocked after lock expiration
backend_code.pos.service.ts: Fixed processLockMutation() to delegate to InventoryService.createLock(); added getStoreInventory() method
backend_code.pos.controller.ts: Added GET /pos/inventory endpoint for store inventory lookup
backend_code.pos.module.ts: Imported InventoryModule for DI resolution of InventoryService
backend_code.get-inventory.dto.ts: Created DTO with storeId (required), search and category (optional) query params
backend_code.analytics.service.ts: Fixed dashboard response from nested to flat structure; added getActiveRentalsCount, getTotalCustomersCount, getTotalProductsCount helpers; added revenueChart method with formatDateLabel; updated topProducts SQL to join orders for createdAt filter and include product image subquery; made getDateRange public
backend_code.analytics.controller.ts: Added GET revenue-chart endpoint; updated topProducts handler to accept view parameter with getDateRange fallback
backend_code.top-products-query.dto.ts: Added view field with IsEnum(['day','week','month','year']) and IsOptional decorators

frontend_code.api/client.ts: Removed admin_token from request interceptor token priority — apiClient now only uses auth_token or guest_token
frontend_code.api/wallet.ts: Added adminGetWalletStats() and adminGetWalletTransactions() using adminClient, plus AdminWalletStats and AdminWalletTransactionFilters types
frontend_code.utils/constants.ts: Added adminWalletStats and adminWalletTransactions query keys
frontend_code.pages/Admin/Wallet/index.tsx: Replaced customer wallet hooks (useWalletBalance, useWalletTransactions) with admin hooks (useAdminWalletStats, useAdminWalletTransactions); added TotalUsers stat card (4-column grid)
frontend_code.store/authStore.ts: Added isAdminAuthValidated field (default false), setAdminAuthValidated action; setAdminAuth sets isAdminAuthValidated=true; adminLogout and clearAuth reset to false
frontend_code.components/auth/AuthInitializer.tsx: NEW — validates admin token via /admin/auth/me on app load for admin routes, shows LoadingSpinner during validation, redirects to /admin/login on failure
frontend_code.App.tsx: Added isAdminAuthValidated check alongside isAdminAuthenticated for admin route guarding
frontend_code.main.tsx: Wrapped App with AuthInitializer inside BrowserRouter
frontend_code.api/inventory.ts: Added AdjustStockData interface and adjustStock() function (PATCH /admin/inventory/adjust-stock); added quantityLocked: number to InventoryListItem interface
frontend_code.hooks/useInventory.ts: Added useAdjustStock mutation hook that invalidates inventory query on success
frontend_code.pages/Admin/Inventory/components/StockAd: NEW — StockAdjustmentModal with store selector, Add/Remove/Set Absolute radio, quantity input, notes textarea, current stock display, validation, and Apply button
frontend_code.pages/Admin/Inventory/InventoryView.tsx: Added Adjust Stock button in actions column, showAdjustModal/selectedAdjustItem state, StockAdjustmentModal rendering; added lockQuantity state, quantity input in lock modal, Locked column in table, quantityLocked display in variant detail stock summary (grid-cols-4), quantity validation and passing in handleCreateLock, lockQuantity reset on modal close/cancel; [NEW] Added Spec column with size/color after Product column; Added Variant Info header (SKU/Size/Color) in Detail Modal before Stock Summary; Enhanced Lock Modal with variant info display, store selector dropdown with avail/locked counts, max available indicator after qty input; Updated active locks list to show Size, Color, Qty, Store name; Added lockStoreId state; handleCreateLock validates lockStoreId and checks max available stock; onClose/Cancel reset lockStoreId
frontend_code.pages/Admin/Inventory/components/StockAd: Updated stock info section to show product name, SKU, size, color specs, and Available/Locked/Sold summary
frontend_code.pages/POS/PosPage.tsx: Updated loadProducts() to fetch from /pos/inventory endpoint with storeId param and x-pos-api-key/x-pos-device-id headers; maps quantityAvailable to stock field instead of p.stock; removed flatMap nested variants logic
frontend_code.types/product.ts: Added initialStock?: { storeId: string; quantity: number }[] to CreateVariantData
frontend_code.pages/Admin/Products/ProductForm.tsx: Added useStores data fetching, VariantFormData.initialStock field, emptyVariant.initialStock default, handleVariantInitialStockChange handler, collapsible Initial Stock section with per-store inputs, initialStock passed on submit, initialStock: [] in edit variant population
frontend_code.types/inventory.ts: Added quantityLocked: number to InventorySummary, quantity: number to InventoryLock, quantity?: number to CreateLockData

db_schema.schema.prisma: Added quantityLocked field to InventorySummary model (after quantityReserved, before quantitySold); added LOCK, UNLOCK, RESERVATION, SALE_FINAL to StockMovementType enum; added partial index inventory_summary_locked_idx on (storeId, quantityLocked) WHERE quantityLocked > 0

errors.expected: Type-safe access to response.permissions (or AdminMeResponse type updated to include permissions)
errors.actual: Direct cast from AdminMeResponse to Record<string, unknown> which TypeScript rejects — TS2352
errors.fix: Cast through unknown first: (response as unknown as Record<string, unknown>).permissions as string[] ?? [], or better: add permissions?: string[] to AdminMeResponse type

errors.expected: useEffect should re-run when navigating to admin routes to validate the token. Dependency array should include location.pathname so SPA navigation triggers re-validation.
errors.actual: Empty dependency array [] means the effect only runs once on mount. SPA navigation from customer route to admin route skips validation, leaving isAdminAuthValidated=false, causing App.tsx to redirect to /admin/login even with a valid token.
errors.fix: Add location.pathname as dependency and guard with isAdminAuthValidated check: useEffect(() => { if (useAuthStore.getState().isAdminAuthValidated) { setIsValidating(false); return; } validateAuth(); }, [location.pathname]);

notes.requirement_coverage: All 10 REQ-FE-* requirements are implemented with matching file evidence. research_report_coverage.json is from a previous pipeline iteration (REQ-LP-*) and does not overlap with current REQ-FE-* coverage. This is a pipeline configuration artifact, not an implementation error.
